basics.description: Deploys the Cisco Duo Security (CCF) solution: three connectors (authentication, activity, telephony), a shared DCE, per-connector DCRs and tables, the CiscoDuo parser, analytic rules, hunting queries, and the workbook. Authentication uses Microsoft's built-in **CiscoDuo** CCF auth type — **no signing proxy or Azure Function**. After deployment, open each Cisco Duo connector in Microsoft Sentinel > Data connectors, enter your Duo API host / integration key / secret key, and click **Connect**.

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Microsoft Sentinel workspace name
basics.toolTip: Name of the Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace in this resource group.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid Log Analytics workspace name.

options.text: Duo credentials (API host, integration key, secret key) are entered on each connector page after deployment — Data connectors > Cisco Duo Security … > Connect — not here. No secret is stored in this deployment.
